# Skill: New Component

Scaffold a new React component following this project's exact patterns.

## When to use

When adding new UI to the frontend.

## How to fill this in

1. Build your first component manually.
2. Once it's working and reviewed, paste it below as the reference pattern.
3. Include your styling approach and data fetching patterns.

## Component Locations

<!-- Where do different types of components go?
     Example:
     - admin/ — configuration screens
     - workflow/ — user-facing flow
     - shared/ — reusable across contexts
     - ui/ — primitives (buttons, cards, dialogs)
-->

## Styling Notes

<!-- Document your styling patterns:
     - Theme tokens / color names
     - Common utility class combinations
     - Responsive breakpoints
-->

## Checklist (for the agent)

- [ ] Create component file in the correct directory
- [ ] Define props interface
- [ ] Handle loading, error, and empty states
- [ ] Use project styling patterns (no hardcoded colors)
- [ ] Register route if it's a page component
- [ ] Add to relevant barrel export if applicable
